mapper.sql: select id, site_id, name, description, logo_url, banner_url, qrcode_url, official_url, download_url, android_url, ios_url, promote_url_1, promote_url_2, promote_url_3, register_download_url, discount_rate, features, game_count, sort_order, priority, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from gb_game_boxes

if.test: queryMode != null and queryMode == 'related' and siteId != null

select.if:
WITH RECURSIVE category_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM gb_categories WHERE id = #{categoryId} AND del_flag = '0' UNION ALL SELECT c.id FROM gb_categories c INNER JOIN category_tree ct ON c.parent_id = ct.id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' )
select b.id, b.site_id, b.name, b.description, b.logo_url, b.banner_url, b.qrcode_url, b.official_url, b.download_url, b.android_url, b.ios_url, b.promote_url_1, b.promote_url_2, b.promote_url_3, b.register_download_url, b.discount_rate, b.features, b.sort_order, b.status, b.del_flag, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark, b.category_id, IFNULL(game_cnt_c.cnt, 0) as game_count, IFNULL(site_rel_cnt_c.incl_cnt, 0) as related_sites_count, IFNULL(site_rel_cnt_c.excl_cnt, 0) as excluded_sites_count, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon from gb_game_boxes b left join gb_categories c on b.category_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' -- 预聚合：盒子内游戏总数（creator 模式不过滤站点可见性，统计盒子所有有效游戏） LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.box_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM gb_box_game_relations r INNER JOIN gb_games g ON r.game_id = g.id AND g.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY r.box_id ) game_cnt_c ON b.id = game_cnt_c.box_id -- 预聚合：关联/排除站点数量 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT box_id, SUM(CASE WHEN relation_type = 'include' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS incl_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN relation_type = 'exclude' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS excl_cnt FROM gb_site_box_relations GROUP BY box_id ) site_rel_cnt_c ON b.id = site_rel_cnt_c.box_id
b.del_flag = '0'
and (b.site_id = #{siteId} OR b.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId})
and b.site_id = #{siteId}
and b.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}
and 1 = 0
and b.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and ( b.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM category_tree) OR b.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT bcr.box_id FROM gb_box_category_relations bcr WHERE bcr.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM category_tree) ) )
and b.status = #{status}
order by b.sort_order asc, b.create_time desc

mapper.select: select b.*, c.id as category_id, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon from gb_game_boxes b left join gb_categories c on b.category_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' where b.id = #{id} and b.del_flag = '0'

select b.*, c.id as category_id, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon from gb_game_boxes b left join gb_categories c on b.category_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' where b.del_flag = '0' order by b.id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_game_boxes
site_id, name, description, category_id, logo_url, banner_url, qrcode_url, official_url, download_url, android_url, ios_url, promote_url_1, promote_url_2, promote_url_3, register_download_url, discount_rate, features, game_count, sort_order, priority, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{siteId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{logoUrl}, #{bannerUrl}, #{qrcodeUrl}, #{officialUrl}, #{downloadUrl}, #{androidUrl}, #{iosUrl}, #{promoteUrl1}, #{promoteUrl2}, #{promoteUrl3}, #{registerDownloadUrl}, #{discountRate}, #{features}, #{gameCount}, #{sortOrder}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update gb_game_boxes set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update gb_game_boxes set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.site_id, b.name, b.description, b.logo_url, b.banner_url, b.qrcode_url, b.official_url, b.download_url, b.android_url, b.ios_url, b.promote_url_1, b.promote_url_2, b.promote_url_3, b.register_download_url, b.discount_rate, b.features, b.sort_order, b.status, b.del_flag, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark, b.download_count, b.rating, sbr.is_visible as site_is_visible, sbr.is_featured as site_is_featured, sbr.sort_order as site_sort_order FROM gb_game_boxes b INNER JOIN gb_box_category_relations r ON b.id = r.box_id INNER JOIN gb_site_box_relations sbr ON b.id = sbr.box_id AND sbr.site_id = #{siteId} WHERE r.category_id = #{categoryId} AND b.status = '1' AND b.del_flag = '0' AND sbr.is_visible = '1' ORDER BY
b.create_time DESC
b.rating DESC
b.download_count DESC

SELECT b.id, b.site_id, b.name, b.description, b.logo_url, b.banner_url, b.qrcode_url, b.official_url, b.download_url, b.android_url, b.ios_url, b.promote_url_1, b.promote_url_2, b.promote_url_3, b.register_download_url, b.discount_rate, b.features, b.sort_order, b.status, b.del_flag, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_box_game_relations r WHERE r.box_id = b.id) as game_count, COALESCE(sbr.is_visible, '1') as site_is_visible, COALESCE(sbr.is_featured, '0') as site_is_featured, COALESCE(sbr.sort_order, b.sort_order) as site_sort_order FROM gb_game_boxes b LEFT JOIN gb_site_box_relations sbr ON b.id = sbr.box_id AND sbr.site_id = #{siteId} WHERE b.status = '1' AND b.del_flag = '0' AND (b.site_id = #{siteId} OR b.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}) AND (sbr.id IS NULL OR sbr.is_visible = '1')
AND b.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT box_id FROM gb_box_category_relations WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} )
ORDER BY site_sort_order ASC, b.create_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.site_id, b.name, b.description, b.logo_url, b.banner_url, b.qrcode_url, b.official_url, b.download_url, b.android_url, b.ios_url, b.promote_url_1, b.promote_url_2, b.promote_url_3, b.register_download_url, b.discount_rate, b.features, b.sort_order, b.status, b.del_flag, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_box_game_relations r2 WHERE r2.box_id = b.id) as game_count FROM gb_game_boxes b INNER JOIN gb_box_game_relations r ON b.id = r.box_id INNER JOIN gb_site_box_relations sbr ON b.id = sbr.box_id AND sbr.site_id = #{siteId} WHERE r.game_id = #{gameId} AND b.status = '1' AND b.del_flag = '0' AND sbr.is_visible = '1' ORDER BY sbr.sort_order ASC, b.sort_order ASC, b.create_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.site_id, b.name, b.description, b.logo_url, b.banner_url, b.qrcode_url, b.official_url, b.download_url, b.android_url, b.ios_url, b.promote_url_1, b.promote_url_2, b.promote_url_3, b.register_download_url, b.discount_rate, b.features, b.sort_order, b.status, b.del_flag, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_box_game_relations r2 WHERE r2.box_id = b.id) as game_count FROM gb_game_boxes b INNER JOIN gb_article_box_relations r ON b.id = r.box_id INNER JOIN gb_site_box_relations sbr ON b.id = sbr.box_id AND sbr.site_id = #{siteId} WHERE r.article_id = #{articleId} AND b.status = '1' AND b.del_flag = '0' AND sbr.is_visible = '1' ORDER BY sbr.sort_order ASC, b.sort_order ASC, b.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE gb_games g INNER JOIN gb_box_game_relations bgr ON g.id = bgr.game_id SET g.site_id = #{newSiteId}, g.update_time = NOW() WHERE bgr.box_id = #{boxId}
